title: schoenus capillaris
intro: Schoenus capillaris, also known as the thread spike-rush or thread-spike rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schoenus capillaris include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used to make a poultice or salve to aid in wound healing.
